name: Hayes 16x24 Garage Plan - A Classic Garage + Porch Built for Craftsmanship, Comfort & Everyday Versatility
open_features: A flexible footprint perfect for vehicle storage, woodworking, hobby space, or tool organization - plus a relaxing side porch ideal for seating, potting, or morning coffee.
Straightforward framing, clean edges, and intuitive build steps make this plan accessible for new builders and seasoned pros alike.
A traditional raised-panel garage door with upper window lights brings durability and timeless architectural style.
Horizontal wood siding, crisp white trim, bronze lantern lighting, and covered porch accents create a welcoming, rustic-modern appearance.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Hayes Garage Plan - a 16x24 traditional garage and porch design crafted for efficiency, charm, and multi-purpose functionality. With its timeless gable roof, natural wood-look siding, spacious covered porch, and classic carriage-style garage door, the Hayes blends cozy cottage aesthetics with practical, everyday performance. Whether you're building a home workshop, garden equipment hub, hobby studio, or small vehicle garage, the Hayes 16x24 delive...
